11.4. Be it stated that Section 15 was also introduced in the 
Environment Act by way of the 2023 amendment with 
effect from 01.04.2024. Section 15 deals with penalty for 
contravention of the provisions of the Environment Act, rules, 
orders and directions. Section 15 reads thus:
15. Penalty for contravention of provisions of 
Act, rules, orders and directions.—(1) Where any 
person contravenes or does not comply with any of 
the provisions of this Act or the rules made or orders 
or directions issued thereunder for which no penalty 
is provided, he shall be liable to penalty in respect 
316 
Supreme Court Reports
of each such contravention which shall not be less 
than ten thousand rupees but which may extend to 
fifteen lakh rupees.
(2) Where any person continues contravention under 
sub-section (1), he shall be liable to additional penalty 
of ten thousand rupees for every day during which 
such contravention continues.
